'''banungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcase|headcase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcase|headcase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæningith|bæningith]] || [[word:bæningij|bæningij]] || [[word:bæningish|bæningish]] || [[word:bæningi|bæningi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:banununguth|banununguth]] || [[word:banununguj|banununguj]] || [[word:banunungush|banunungush]] || [[word:banunungu|banunungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banunguth|banunguth]] || [[word:banunguj|banunguj]] || [[word:banungush|banungush]] || [[word:banungu|banungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:banufngufth|banufngufth]] || [[word:banufngufj|banufngufj]] || [[word:banufngufsh|banufngufsh]] || [[word:banufnguf|banufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banunguthu|banunguthu]] || [[word:banunguju|banunguju]] || [[word:banungushu|banungushu]] || [[word:banunguku|banunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banunguth|banunguth]] || [[word:banunguj|banunguj]] || [[word:banungush|banungush]] || [[word:banungu|banungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banunguthul|banunguthul]] || [[word:banungujul|banungujul]] || [[word:banungushul|banungushul]] || [[word:banungukul|banungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banunguuthuthu|banunguuthuthu]] || [[word:banunguujuju|banunguujuju]] || [[word:banunguushushu|banunguushushu]] || [[word:banunguuku|banunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banunguthun|banunguthun]] || [[word:banungujun|banungujun]] || [[word:banungushun|banungushun]] || [[word:banungukun|banungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banunguthuoro|banunguthuoro]] || [[word:banungujuoro|banungujuoro]] || [[word:banungushuoro|banungushuoro]] || [[word:banungukuoro|banungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
